title: Gender Reveal Balloon Boy or Girl, 36inch Large Latex Beige Baby Gender Reveal Balloons for Baby Shower New baby Balloons Party (style 2)
features: Baby Gender Reveal Party Balloon with Confetti: Include 36 inch beige gender reveal balloons, 1 pack of pink confetti + 1 pack of blue confetti, 1 pins and 1 roll of beige ribbon.
Double Design Material: The baby shower balloon is made of thickened double-layer natural latex, which is very durable, and the confetti is made of paper, non-toxic, reliable.

Product Size: This gender revealed confetti balloon dimensions after full inflation measured about 36 inch/91.44cm. It large enough for your decoration, can easily attract people’s attention and can easily adapt to any venue size outdoor indoor.

Suitable for any Occasions: Large Latex Boy or Girl Balloon for Baby Shower Gender Reveal Party Decoration, for gender reveal ideas, gender reveal boy or girl, gender reveal party, gender reveal party decoration.
Easy to Use: Just add baby shower confetti (blue or pink confetti) and inflate the balloon with helium or air (if the balloon is full of air, it won't float) , tie the balloon and you're done.
